flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Northwest Indian College are 19% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($35.4k vs $43.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Northwest Indian College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (45.8% → 55.0%).
